message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor ": Teacher" as Teacher
boundary ": UpdateRollCallForm" as Form
control ": StudentController" as Controller
entity ": RollCall" as RollCall
entity ": ClassroomMember" as Member

Teacher -> Form : 1 // request update roll call
activate Form
Form -> Controller : 2 // request update roll call
activate Controller
Controller -> Member : 3 // checking information is valid
activate Member

alt [information is valid]
  Member --> Controller : 5 // Information is valid
  deactivate Member
  Controller -> RollCall : 6 // Request make roll call
  activate RollCall
  deactivate RollCall
  Controller --> Form : 8 // Roll call update done
  deactivate Controller
  Form --> Teacher : 9 // Roll call done
  deactivate Form
else [information is not valid]
  Member --> Controller : 5.1 // Information is not valid
  deactivate Member
  Controller --> Form : 5.2 // Roll call update failed
  deactivate Controller
  Form --> Teacher : 5.3 // Roll call failed,\ncheck information again
  deactivate Form
end

@enduml
```
